author.name: Gyan Prakash Sahu
author.bio: A poet, wanderer, and observer of the quiet moments between heartbeats. I write to capture the fleeting beauty of nature and human connection.

poems.title: The Falling of Autumn
text: Gold and crimson drift gently down,
A fiery crown upon the earth.
The crisp air bites, the shadows stretch,
A silent death, a quiet birth.
We walk among the whispered crunch,
Of memories laid bare and dry.
The trees stand naked, unashamed,
Beneath the vast, unforgiving sky.

poems.title: Song of the Tide
text: The ocean breathes a rhythmic sigh,
Upon the sandy, golden shore.
It pulls me in, it pushes back,
A restless heart, forevermore.
